title: The War at Marineford Begins: Key Exchange

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Do what you want, I'll be below.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: gentlemen, I have something to tell you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: None of this is your fault...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Say the name of your father!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is this the time for that...?

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Using sheer willpower to perform a trick....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No... she deceived the entire world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your mother's name was Portgas D. Rouge.
